header.title: Get recommendations of products to purchase for the filtered vendor based on stock on hand, and expected sales volumes or actual demand.

i.t-attf-class: fa fa-lg fa-lightbulb-o o_search_panel_section_icon text-primary me-2

input.class: o_input_suggest_search_panel form-control form-control-sm border-0 border-bottom border-dark text-dark text-end rounded-0 mx-0 p-1

span.title: The number of days to consider for the replenishment suggestion.

select.class: form-select bg-white form-select-sm border-0 border-bottom border-dark text-dark rounded-0 mx-1 p-1
select.style: width: 7rem; box-shadow: none; background-position: right 0rem center; background-size: 0.6rem;

input.class: form-control form-control-sm border-0 border-bottom border-dark text-dark text-end rounded-0 mx-0 p-1

span.title: Estimate the sales volume for the period based on past period or order the forecasted quantity for that period.
